---
title: "Words"
---
| Slides | Background reading | Primary literature | 
| -- | -- | -- |
| <span class="blue-badge">Words ↗</span> | SGN Ch. 5: *Activating Words*  | Marinkovic et al. (2003) |


::: {.callout-tip appearance=simple}
# Learning Goals

:::

<!-- Mentimeter>


<!-- Skip 
- SGN Ch. 6: *Representing Meaning*
- Huth et al. (2016)
-->
